api/cli/dev.title: dev
api/cli/dev.description: Starts a development server with live preview.

api/cli/render.title: render
api/cli/render.description: Renders a composition to a video file.

api/core/absolute-fill.title: AbsoluteFill
api/core/absolute-fill.description: A full-screen container that fills its parent using absolute positioning. Supports ref forwarding.

api/core/audio.title: Audio
api/core/audio.description: Plays audio synchronized to the timeline.

api/core/composition.title: Composition
api/core/composition.description: Registers a video composition with its configuration. The component renders nothing — it registers via a useEffect side effect.

api/core/delay-render.title: delayRender() / continueRender() / cancelRender()
api/core/delay-render.description: Low-level API for delaying frame capture until async operations complete.

api/core/easing.title: Easing
api/core/easing.description: A collection of easing functions for use with interpolate.

api/core/freeze.title: Freeze
api/core/freeze.description: Freezes the timeline at a specific frame. Children always see the given frame number regardless of the actual current frame.

api/core/img.title: Img
api/core/img.description: Renders an image with delay render support. The render waits until the image has loaded.

api/core/interpolate.title: interpolate()
api/core/interpolate.description: Maps an input value from one range to another, with optional easing and extrapolation.

api/core/interpolate-colors.title: interpolateColors()
api/core/interpolate-colors.description: Interpolates between colors. Supports hex, rgb, and rgba formats.

api/core/loop.title: Loop
api/core/loop.description: Repeats its children for a specified number of times or indefinitely.

api/core/measure-spring.title: measureSpring()
api/core/measure-spring.description: Calculates the number of frames a spring animation takes to settle.

api/core/random.title: random()
api/core/random.description: Deterministic pseudo-random number generator. Given the same seed, always returns the same value.

api/core/sequence.title: Sequence
api/core/sequence.description: Shifts the timeline for its children. Inside a Sequence, useCurrentFrame() returns 0 at the frame specified by from.

api/core/series.title: Series
api/core/series.description: Arranges children sequentially in time. Each child plays after the previous one finishes.

api/core/spring.title: spring()
api/core/spring.description: Physics-based spring animation. Returns a value that animates from from to to.

api/core/static-file.title: staticFile()
api/core/static-file.description: Returns the path to a file in the public/ directory.

api/core/still.title: Still
api/core/still.description: A single-frame composition for generating images. Equivalent to a Composition with durationInFrames= and fps={1}.

api/core/use-current-frame.title: useCurrentFrame()
api/core/use-current-frame.description: Returns the current frame number. Inside a Sequence, the frame is relative to the sequence start.

api/core/use-delay-render.title: useDelayRender()
api/core/use-delay-render.description: Hook version of delayRender / continueRender. Delays rendering until the returned callback is called.

api/core/use-video-config.title: useVideoConfig()
api/core/use-video-config.description: Returns the video configuration. Throws if called outside a Composition or Player.

api/core/video.title: Video
api/core/video.description: Embeds a video synchronized to the timeline.

api/player/player.title: Player
api/player/player.description: Embeddable React component for previewing Minopamotion videos.

api/player/player-ref.title: PlayerRef
api/player/player-ref.description: Imperative API for controlling the Player programmatically.

api/player/thumbnail.title: Thumbnail
api/player/thumbnail.description: Renders a single frame of a video. Useful for previews and galleries.

api/renderer/bundle.title: bundle()
api/renderer/bundle.description: Bundles the video project into a static site that can be served for rendering.

api/renderer/render-frames.title: renderFrames()
api/renderer/render-frames.description: Renders individual frames of a composition as images.

api/renderer/render-media.title: renderMedia()
api/renderer/render-media.description: Renders a composition to a video file.

api/renderer/serve.title: serve()
api/renderer/serve.description: Starts a local HTTP server to serve a bundled video project.

api/renderer/stitch-frames-to-video.title: stitchFramesToVideo()
api/renderer/stitch-frames-to-video.description: Combines rendered frames into a video file using FFmpeg.

api/webcodecs/render-media-in-browser.title: renderMediaInBrowser()
api/webcodecs/render-media-in-browser.description: Renders a composition to a video file in the browser using the WebCodecs API.

concepts/animation.title: Animation
concepts/animation.description: Minopamotion provides two animation primitives: interpolate for linear/eased animations and spring for physics-based animations.

concepts/compositions.title: Compositions
concepts/compositions.description: A Composition registers a video with its configuration. It defines what component to render and the video dimensions, fps, and duration.

concepts/media.title: Media
concepts/media.description: Minopamotion provides components for embedding images, audio, and video that synchronize with the timeline.

concepts/sequences.title: Sequences
concepts/sequences.description: A Sequence shifts the timeline for its children. It lets you arrange elements in time without manually calculating frame offsets.

getting-started/project-structure.title: Project Structure
getting-started/project-structure.description: Minopamotion is organized as a monorepo with several packages.

getting-started/your-first-video.title: Your First Video
getting-started/your-first-video.description: This guide walks you through creating a simple video with Minopamotion and previewing it in the browser.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: Minopamotion is a library for creating videos programmatically using React.

player/overview.title: Player Overview
player/overview.description: The @minopamotion/player package provides an embeddable React component for previewing Minopamotion videos in the browser.

player/player-component.title: Player Component
player/player-component.description: The Player component renders a Minopamotion video with playback controls.

player/player-ref.title: PlayerRef
player/player-ref.description: The PlayerRef provides an imperative API for controlling the Player programmatically.

player/thumbnail.title: Thumbnail
player/thumbnail.description: The Thumbnail component renders a single frame of a video — useful for previews, social cards, or video galleries.

rendering/cli.title: CLI
rendering/cli.description: The @minopamotion/cli package provides a command-line interface for rendering videos.

rendering/client-side.title: Client-Side Rendering
rendering/client-side.description: The @minopamotion/webcodecs package renders videos directly in the browser using the WebCodecs API.

rendering/overview.title: Rendering Overview
rendering/overview.description: Minopamotion provides multiple rendering backends for producing final video files from your compositions.

rendering/server-side.title: Server-Side Rendering
rendering/server-side.description: The @minopamotion/renderer package renders videos on the server using Puppeteer for frame capture and FFmpeg for encoding.

studio/overview.title: Studio
studio/overview.description: The Minopamotion Studio is a visual editor for building and previewing videos.
